arts.sum: Allianz Stadium forms the backdrop for a mouth-watering UEFA Champions League meeting between Juventus and Manchester City. With stakes at an all-time high for both sides ahead of Wednesday night's kick-off, a loss for either team would likely mean the end of their hopes of securing automatic knockout qualification.
